# Narender Charan — SEO and GEO Specialist

> Narender Charan is a Web3 content strategist and SEO/GEO specialist with 8 years of experience building organic audiences, ranking content on Google, and getting brands cited in AI-generated answers. He is available for freelance and full-time remote work globally.

## About

Narender Charan specialises in SEO (search engine optimisation) and GEO (generative engine optimisation) for crypto protocols, blockchain infrastructure, SaaS companies, fintech brands, and any organisation that wants to rank on Google and get cited by AI systems like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini.

He has been working remotely since 2017 and is based in India.

## What he does

- SEO strategy and content: keyword research, topical authority building, content clustering
- GEO (generative engine optimisation): structuring content for AI retrieval and citation
- GTM content and launch strategy: positioning, messaging, launch sequencing, partner activation
- Web3 content and community: whitepapers, tokenomics docs, technical explainers, X/Twitter strategy
- Content audit and GEO readiness: identifying what is blocking AI systems from citing a brand

## Proven results

- Grew Velar's X (Twitter) account from zero to 100,000+ followers
- Ranked RemoteStack (remotestack.io) at number one for its core keyword within weeks of launch on a new domain with zero backlinks
- Achieved 10,000+ search impressions for RemoteStack within weeks of launch
- Led the full ICO campaign for Velar, driving strong token sale participation
- Earned organic citations for RemoteStack inside ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini
- Published 500+ articles across crypto, blockchain, and fintech publications

## Work history

- GTM Strategy Manager at DogeOS (Jul 2025 – Dec 2025)
- Head of Content and Marketing at Velar, Bitcoin DeFi on Stacks (May 2023 – Jun 2025)
- Content and Social Media Manager at Panther Protocol (Jun 2022 – Dec 2022)
- Head of Content at HyperLinq (Jan 2021 – May 2022)
- Freelance Web3 Writer and Editor (Oct 2017 – Oct 2020)

## Web3 expertise

DeFi, L2s, ZK-proofs, tokenomics, NFTs, Bitcoin ecosystem, Stacks blockchain, Dogecoin L2
